docs.title: What is Missouri Mesh?
docs.text: We are a community of LoRa enuthesiates working together to create an off-grid, decentralized, and resilient communications network. Operating within the unlicensed 915 MHz ISM band, these devices are typically loaded with either MeshCore or Meshtastic firmware, enabling users to communicate without using traditional networks.

docs.title: What is MeshCore and Meshtastic?
docs.text: MeshCore and Meshtastic are projects aimed at encrypted text communication over LoRa radios in a decentralized nature. Check out their websites for more info.

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text:
1. Join our Discord
  2. Purchase supported hardware and antenna
  3. Flash your hardware with the MeshCore or Meshtastic firmware
  4. Download the corresponding app for your firmware, then connect to your node (MeshCore: iOS or Android; Meshtastic: iOS or Android).

docs.title: Contact
docs.text: Reach out on our Discord server or directly by email at missourimesh@outlook.com.
